output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?reserve ?reserveLabel WHERE {
  ?reserve wdt:P17 wd:Q166 ; wdt:P1705 wd:Q309747 ; rdfs:label ?reserveLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?reserveLabel) = 'en')
}
